hero.tagline: Managing Business Through Knowledge, Processes and Technology
hero.description: Fluxor Consulting is an expert in transforming distributed companies through comprehensive consulting and digitalisation: from strategy to implementation. We combine deep industry expertise with project and process management practice, helping businesses in IT, finance, manufacturing and logistics achieve sustainable growth and operational efficiency.

s1.title: 1. General Provisions
s1.text: This Privacy Policy defines the procedure for processing and protecting personal data of individuals who submit their data via the contact form on fluxorconsulting.com. The data controller is Fluxor Consulting LLC (hereinafter — the Controller). Personal data is processed in accordance with Federal Law No. 152-FZ of 27.07.2006 'On Personal Data'.

s2.title: 2. Personal Data Collected
s2.text: The Controller processes the following personal data voluntarily provided by the user when completing the contact form:

s3.title: 3. Purpose of Processing
s3.text: Personal data is processed exclusively for the following purposes:
s3.i1: Reviewing the inquiry and preparing a response
s3.i2: Establishing business contact with prospective clients

s4.title: 4. Data Storage and Security
s4.text: Personal data is stored on servers located in the Russian Federation. The Controller implements necessary organisational and technical measures to protect personal data from unauthorised access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. Retention period: 3 (three) years from the date of consent, or until the consent is withdrawn by the data subject.

s5.title: 5. Third-Party Disclosure
s5.text: The Controller does not transfer personal data to third parties, except as required by applicable Russian law.

s6.title: 6. Rights of the Data Subject
s6.text: The user has the right to:
s6.i1: Obtain information about the processing of their personal data
s6.i2: Request correction, blocking or deletion of their personal data
s6.i3: Withdraw consent to personal data processing at any time
s6.i4: Lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority (Roskomnadzor)

s7.title: 7. Cookies
s7.text: The website fluxorconsulting.com does not use cookies and does not collect web analytics data.

s8.title: 8. Contact Information
s8.text:
For any questions regarding the processing of personal data, please contact the Controller:

Fluxor Consulting LLC
Email: hello@fluxorconsulting.com
